title: jurinea transsylvanica
intro: Jurinea transsylvanica, also known as the Transylvanian Jurinea, is a plant species in the dandelion family, Asteraceae, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves have been used in folk medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jurinea transsylvanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant's medicinal properties can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
